/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/pr_cmds.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/pr_edict.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/pr_exec.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_init.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_main.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_nchan.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_ents.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_send.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_move.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_phys.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_user.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sv_ccmds.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/world.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/sys_unix.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/model.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/cmd.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/common.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/crc.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/cvar.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/mathlib.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/md4.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/zone.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/pmove.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/pmovetst.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/net_chan.c.o CMakeFiles/qwsv.dir/__/client/net_udp.c.o -o qwsv  -lm
